name: DJI Wireless Mic Receiver (USB Audio Mode)
quirks: Only applies when PipeWire or ALSA exposes an actual Wireless Microphone RX source.
Do not auto-select the receiver from USB VID/PID alone; the observed 2ca3:4011 descriptor is vendor-specific bulk transport, not a USB Audio Class microphone.
If a phone adapter or cable exposes the receiver as a standard source, treat it as the preferred non-Bluetooth microphone for keeping headphones on A2DP.
source_notes: DJI support documents computer microphone use as Wireless Microphone RX.
DJI Mic documentation and reviews consistently describe 48 kHz digital audio capture for receiver-based computer/camera workflows.
Local lsusb descriptor for 2ca3:4011 reports class 255 vendor-specific with bulk endpoints, so WaveLinux requires an exposed audio source before treating it as capture.
